commit.message:
fix: lazy image loading + mask loading to prevent OOM on 400+ camera scenes

- Lazy images: Camera objects load from disk on access instead of pre-loading
  all into RAM. Reduces startup memory from ~32GB to ~12GB for 418 cameras.
- Lazy masks: load mask PNGs on demand instead of storing per-scale tensors.
- Fix DENSIFICATION missing from step_funcs dispatch dict.
- Fix quality variable reference in PipelineState.create.
- Default difix3d_tau changed from 400 to 200 (paper default).

commit.message:
Claude/enable agent teams m bs om (#142)

* feat: redesign live trading dashboard UI with improved layout and styling

Overhaul the dashboard HTML/CSS with better color variables, cleaner layout,
and enhanced visual hierarchy for the trading interface.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* feat: add live status dashboard to GitHub Pages

- Create docs/live.html — polls docs/data/live_stats.json every 30s
  showing real-time bot status, price, trades, decisions, modifiers
- Update publish_stats.py to write to docs/data/ instead of Website/data/
  so GitHub Pages can serve the live data
- Add "Live" nav link to docs/index.html
- Seed docs/data/live_stats.json with current data

Now when publish_stats.py runs locally alongside the bot, it pushes
sanitized stats to GitHub every 60s, and the live page auto-refreshes.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* feat: HTF historical backfill + modifier engine fix (defaults to 1.0, static FOMC calendar)

- HTF engine backfilled with historical bars on startup (IBKR or synthetic)
- All HTF timeframes (1m-1D) fed through HTFBiasEngine for immediate bias
- HAR-RV forecaster initialized from 180 days of daily bars
- Overnight modifier seeded with previous day close from historical data
- All modifier defaults changed from 0.0 to 1.0 (never zeros out sizing)
- Gamma modifier fallback explicitly returns 1.0 with detail keys
- InstitutionalModifierEngine stores _last_result for dashboard access
- Trade decision logger default modifier_values: 1.0 not 0.0
- Timestamps (HH:MM:SS ET) added to live stats recent decisions
- docs/live.html TIME column added to Recent Decisions table
- Historical bars stored in logs/historical_bars_{tf}.json for dashboard

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* feat: tiered GEX refresh — 5min idle, 2min active, 1min preflight

Replace fixed 15-min REFRESH_INTERVAL_SECONDS with three tiered intervals
based on trading state:
- REFRESH_INTERVAL_IDLE (300s) — no position, confluence < 0.65
- REFRESH_INTERVAL_ACTIVE (120s) — position open
- REFRESH_INTERVAL_PREFLIGHT (60s) — confluence > 0.65, entry imminent

GEXMonitor.update() now accepts urgency parameter ("idle"/"active"/"preflight").
run_paper_live.py determines urgency from position state and last confluence
score on each bar before calling update().

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* chore: commit pre-existing branch changes

Include uncommitted work already present on the feature branch:
- .gitignore updates
- Dashboard server and live dashboard updates
- Publish stats improvements
- Institutional modifiers and volatility forecast enhancements
- Test updates for gamma regime and volatility forecast
- New test files for GEX monitor and HAR-RV upgrade

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* fix: add NaN guards to GEX monitor + bound forecast history

- gex_monitor.py: Add isfinite() guard on classify_regime() to prevent
  NaN falling through to EXTREME_NEGATIVE (0.75x modifier on corrupted data)
- gex_monitor.py: Add isfinite() guard on total_net_gex in compute_net_gex()
  to reject corrupted API data early
- volatility_forecast.py: Convert unbounded _forecast_history and
  _log_forecast_history lists to deque(maxlen=252) to prevent memory
  growth over months of live trading (~1 year rolling window)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* fix: use qualified contract for historical backfill requests

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* chore: include pre-existing dashboard and agent config changes

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* fix: backfill contract attribute + compute GEX from IBKR options chain

BUG 1: _backfill_historical_bars() referenced self._ibkr_client.contract
(public) but IBKRClient stores it as self._contract (private). Fixed to
use self._ibkr_client._contract.

BUG 2: Quant Data API heat-map endpoint uses UUID request IDs, not ticker
query params, causing 404s. Replaced primary GEX source with IBKR SPX
options chain: requests Index('SPX','CBOE') options, computes naive GEX
locally as sum(gamma * OI * 100 * spot^2 * 0.01) per strike, net GEX =
call_gex - put_gex across strikes within 5% of spot. Quant Data API
kept as fallback for when UUID issue is resolved.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* feat: IBKR order execution module — 2-contract scale-out with safety rails

Complete TWS API order execution via ib_insync with:
- OrderManager: submit_entry(), manage_c1_exit(), manage_c2_trail(),
  close_all_positions() with full 2-contract lifecycle
- 12 safety rails: position size, daily loss ($500), consecutive losses (5),
  no pyramiding, heartbeat (300s), kill switch (10% DD), market halt,
  EOD forced close, direction/NaN validation
- Entry: limit order with 2-tick chase, 5s timeout, partial fill handling
- C1: fixed target exit, C2: monotonic trailing stop with 3-attempt retry
- Edge cases: watchdog (30s), execution dedup, reconnect reconciliation,
  slippage monitoring, PnL sign verification, modifier clamping, bad tick filter
- Integration: run_paper_live.py loop, dashboard API overlays
- 81 tests passing (61 order_manager + 20 paper_trading)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* feat: automatic MNQ contract rollover — 5 days before expiry

Add ContractRoller class that manages MNQ quarterly contract rolls:
- Rolls 5 trading days before 3rd Friday expiry (H→M→U→Z cycle)
- Trading calendar with CME holidays and weekend awareness
- Verifies new contract via IBKR /iserver/secdef/search before switching
- Closes all positions before roll, halts on failure (CRITICAL log)
- Resubscribes data feed and re-runs backfill on new contract
- Integrated into IBKRLiveRunner startup sequence in run_ibkr.py

38 tests passing covering expiry calculation, roll timing, contract
cycle, position closure, data feed resubscription, and failure modes.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* fix: 10 critical/high bugs from production code review

BUG 1 (CRITICAL): Kill switch no longer re-triggers after drawdown cooldown.
  Deactivation now resets peak_equity instead of consecutive_losses when
  triggered by drawdown, preventing the immediate re-trigger loop.

BUG 2 (CRITICAL): C2 trailing stop for shorts verified correct — ratchets
  DOWN as price drops. Removed dead code `== 0` checks (see BUG 5).

BUG 3 (CRITICAL): Broker stop modification race condition fixed. Local
  trade.c2.stop_price now updated ONLY after successful broker API call.
  Failed broker calls log warning and skip local update.

BUG 4 (CRITICAL): Warmup now explicitly suppresses trades. During warmup,
  only feature_engine.update(bar) is called — original_on_bar/process_bar
  are never invoked until warmup completes.

BUG 5 (CRITICAL): Best price initialization standardized. Both c1_best_price
  and c2_best_price initialized to entry_price in paper_enter AND live_enter.
  Removed all `== 0` dead code guards; consistent min()/max() everywhere.

BUG 6 (HIGH): VWAP now resets at session boundaries. process_bar() detects
  new trading day (ET date comparison) and calls feature_engine.reset_session().

BUG 7 (HIGH): Sweep signal stop validation added. If sweep_signal.stop_price
  is 0 or None, sweep_stop_override falls back to None (ATR-based stop)
  instead of computing abs(close - 0) = full instrument price.

BUG 8 (HIGH): Overnight check already uses ZoneInfo("America/New_York") —
  confirmed correct for DST. Added tests verifying summer/winter behavior.

BUG 9 (HIGH): Size multiplier uses min(factors) instead of multiplicative
  chaining. Worst case now 0.25 (single worst factor) instead of 0.01875
  which would round to 0 contracts.

BUG 10 (HIGH): MultiTimeframeIterator.__init__ now sorts data by
  (timestamp, TF_PRIORITY), ensuring HTF bars process before exec-TF.

19 tests added covering all 10 bugs. Full suite: 1234 passed, 6 pre-existing
failures in TWS client mocks (unrelated).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* feat: walk-forward optimization framework with HTML reporting

Adds a rolling-window walk-forward engine that trains on configurable
monthly windows and validates out-of-sample to detect overfitting and
regime breaks. Includes HTML dashboard with Chart.js visualizations,
JSON export, and baseline PASS/FAIL comparison.

- WalkForwardEngine: configurable train/test/step windows, min-trade filter
- WalkForwardReport: JSON + HTML export, console summary
- 46 tests covering fold generation, no-lookahead, degradation, consistency,
  regime breaks, JSON/HTML export, and baseline comparison (all passing)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: two-API-call approach for TYPE 2 multi-step extraction

TYPE 2 now uses sample detail page HTML for step2 code generation:
1. First API call: listing HTML → step1 code (company + detail URLs)
2. Execute step1 in browser → get listings with detail URLs
3. Fetch first detail URL HTML → sanitize
4. Second API call: detail HTML → site-specific step2 code
5. Security scan step2 → override placeholder → executeMultiStep

This ensures Claude sees actual detail page DOM structure instead of
guessing CSS selectors. executeMultiStep unchanged — only step2 overridden.

fix(ext/node): implement proper `resourceLimits` for `node:worker_threads` (#32430)

## Summary

Implements proper `resourceLimits` support for `node:worker_threads`,
matching Node.js behavior:

- **Individual V8 ResourceConstraints**: Uses
`set_max_old_generation_size_in_bytes`,
`set_max_young_generation_size_in_bytes`, `set_code_range_size_in_bytes`
- **Stack size**: Sets OS thread stack size via
`std::thread::Builder::stack_size()` for `stackSizeMb`
- **Resolved limits**: Reads back V8 defaults for unspecified values via
new `op_worker_get_resource_limits` op, so `resourceLimits` inside the
worker always shows actual values (matching Node.js behavior)
- **OOM handling**: Installs near-heap-limit callback that terminates
the worker with `ERR_WORKER_OUT_OF_MEMORY` error code
- **Init ordering fix**: Stores resolved limits in op_state before
`worker.bootstrap()` so the polyfill can read them during init

Closes https://github.com/denoland/deno/issues/26156
Closes https://github.com/denoland/deno/issues/10036

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix Fantrax ID false-match: use consistent id_col across all lookup/roster functions

build_projection_lookup now returns (lookup, id_col) tuple so callers use the
same ID column for both the projection dict keys and the roster ID lookups.
This prevents FantraxID values from accidentally colliding with NFBCID values
for different players (e.g. Braxton Garrett → Garrett Acton).

- generate_weekly_start_sit: unpack tuple, pass id_col to get_team_player_ids + fetch_ros_lookup
- generate_daily_start_sit: same
- generate_pickups_report: use resolve_id_col(pickup_df) before get_owned_ids call

feat: premium cinematic Studio Discovery grid

Visual Design:
- Monochrome white SVG logos — consistent weight, no colour clashes
- Brand-accurate dark card tints (Disney=navy, Marvel=burgundy, A24=graphite, etc.)
- Layered card surfaces: base gradient, top highlight film, inner highlight
- Card specs: h-150px, rounded-[22px], 18-22px padding
- Cinematic ambient background lighting with subtle radial gradients
- No neon, no loud gradients, no glowing effects

Layout:
- 6-col grid on xl, 5 on lg, 4 on md, 3 on sm, 2 on mobile
- gap-5 (20px) consistent spacing
- max-w-1440px container with responsive padding
- Logo in top 2/3, label in bottom 1/3 of each card

Animations:
- Staggered fade-in entrance (0.035s per card)
- Hover: translateY(-3px) scale(1.01), deeper shadow, 240ms ease
- Logo scales 1.04 and brightens on hover
- Border brightness subtly increases
- Respects prefers-reduced-motion

Brand Accuracy:
- All 33 studios verified: names, logos, tint colours
- Logos normalized to consistent visual weight across all cards
- Simplified/monochrome variants that don't clash with dark surfaces

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(active-section): prevent stale IO entries from selecting wrong section

The ratios Map ref in useActiveSection was never cleared on effect
cleanup — stale IntersectionObserver entries persisted across effect
cycles and could win the "best ratio" comparison for sections no
longer tracked. Fixed by clearing the Map on init/teardown and
scoping the comparison loop to a trackedIds Set snapshot.

Set Lounge column width to small in flights table

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: deduplicate search results, preserve FTS5 wildcard, add query strategy disclosure (#16)

- P0: Add deduplicateResults() / deduplicateStatuteMatches() to search-legislation
  and build-legal-stance. Fetch limit*2 rows then deduplicate by
  document_title + section_number to eliminate duplicate numeric/slug IDs.

- P1: Fix fts-query.ts to preserve trailing * on words for FTS5 prefix search.
  Previous regex stripped all * chars, breaking queries like "control*".

- P2: Add query_strategy: 'broadened' to _metadata when search falls back to
  OR-based matching, so callers know results used a broader query.

- CI: Add note? and query_strategy? to ResponseMetadata interface for
  TypeScript strict mode compatibility.

        useOfflineQueue 100-item LRU

           (was: container override, showing solid color at 0%)

Tests: 3453 unit tests pass (3441 in full run + 12 AdminStatCards in isolation)
TypeScript: 0 errors | Lint: 0 errors | Security: 819/819

commit.message:
Fix login rate limit: use real client IP from proxy headers

Read X-Forwarded-For/X-Real-IP headers to get actual client IP
instead of always getting 127.0.0.1 behind reverse proxy.
Prevents one user's failed logins from blocking all users.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

お問い合わせフォームに流入元項目を追加し、メール通知の種別表示を日本語化

- フォームに「どこで当サービスを知りましたか？」select を追加（任意、お問い合わせ種別の前に配置）
- 「その他」選択時のみ補足入力欄を表示（200文字制限）
- Cloud Functions で lead_source のバリデーションとメール本文反映を追加
- お問い合わせ種別・流入元のメール表示を英語値から日本語ラベルに変換
- GA イベント contact_form_submit に lead_source パラメータを追加

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: apply text overlay and update rawImageRef after image edit/replace

handleRegenerateImage now follows the same order as initial generation:
update rawImageRef → run overlayTextOnImage if enabled → set state.
Fixes text disappearing after edits and "تحديث النص" using stale image.
